zh.lifeSummary: 當Berta di Savoia於1051年9月21日出生在法國薩伏伊時，她的父親Count Oddone di Savoia31歲，母親Adelaide di Susa37歲。她於1066年7月13日與Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1087年12月27日在德國海藍-普法爾茲麥音享年36歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲斯培也。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Savoia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

variants.name: Savoie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

nameMeanings.name: Berta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berta di Savoia was born on 21 September 1051, in Savoie, France, her father, Count Oddone di Savoia, was 31 and her mother, Adelaide di Susa, was 37. She married Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser on 13 July 1066. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 December 1087, in Mainz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 36, and was buried in Speyer, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berta di Savoia est née le 21 septembre 1051, à Savoie, France, son père, Count Oddone di Savoia, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelaide di Susa, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser le 13 juillet 1066. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1087, à Mainz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berta di Savoia am 21. September 1051 in Savoyen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Oddone di Savoia 31 und ihre Mutter Adelaide di Susa 37. Sie hat am 13. Juli 1066 Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Dezember 1087 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Mainz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Savoia è nata il il 21 settembre 1051 nel Savoia, Francia, sua padre, Count Oddone di Savoia, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Adelaide di Susa, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser il 13 luglio 1066. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1087, nel Mainz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Berta di Savoiaが1051年9月21日にフランスサボイで生まれた時，父Count Oddone di Savoiaは31歳，母Adelaide di Susaは37歳であった。1066年7月13日にHeinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1087年12月27日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズメインズで36歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズスペヤーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berta di Savoia(이)가 1051년 9월 21일 프랑스 서아보이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Oddone di Savoia(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide di Susa(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1066년 7월 13일 Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1087년 12월 27일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 맹츠에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스피어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Savoia nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1051, em Savoie, França, seu pai, Count Oddone di Savoia, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide di Susa, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser em 13 de julho de 1066. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1087, em Mainz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berta di Savoia родилась 21 сентября 1051 г. в местности савои, Франция, её отцу по имени Count Oddone di Savoia было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide di Susa, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser 13 июля 1066 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 декабря 1087 г. в местности меинз, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности спиир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berta di Savoia nació el 21 de septiembre de 1051, en Savoie, Francia, su papá, Count Oddone di Savoia, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelaide di Susa, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Heinrich IV. Salier Römischer Kaiser el 13 de julio de 1066. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1087, en Mainz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
